config.homepage.allow_temporary_token_bu: Allow temporary token budget overflow for homepage flows
Temporarily raises the homepage system prompt budget relative to the homepage circuit breaker max calls while the current homepage action chain is active.
config.homepage.circuit_breaker_desc: The homepage tool often needs many consecutive tool calls. This sets a separate, higher limit that applies temporarily from the first homepage call until the end of the current action chain.
config.homepage.credentials_desc: Password and SSH key are stored securely in the vault. Enter values below and click Save to store them.
config.homepage.deploy_desc: Configure the remote server for website deployment via SFTP/SCP.
config.homepage.disabled_desc: Enable the toggle above to let the agent design and deploy websites using Docker containers.
config.homepage.docker_engine_unavailabl: Docker engine not reachable. Container management unavailable. Deploy via SSH/SFTP still works.
config.homepage.docker_required_desc: The Homepage tool requires Docker to be enabled. Please activate Docker integration first.
config.homepage.permissions_desc: Control which homepage operations the agent is allowed to perform.
config.homepage.status_inactive: Homepage tool â€” dev container not running
config.homepage.test_desc: Test the SFTP/SCP connection to the deploy target using current settings.
config.homepage.token_budget_preview: Homepage flows may temporarily use about {effective} prompt tokens instead of {base}, based on {homepage_calls}/{base_calls} allowed tool calls.
config.homepage.webserver_desc: Run a local Caddy web server in Docker to preview and host websites. Supports automatic HTTPS when a domain is set.
config.homepage.workspace_autodetect_fai: Auto-detection failed — please enter the path manually.
config.homepage.workspace_autodetect_tit: Auto-detect workspace path from the running homepage container
config.homepage.workspace_desc: Set the absolute host path that is mounted into the homepage container as /workspace.
config.homepage.workspace_path_missing_w: The web server is enabled but no workspace path is set. Enter the absolute host path to your homepage project (e.g. /home/aurago/aurago/agent_workspace/homepage) or click Auto-detect to find it automatically.
config.homepage.workspace_relative_hint: Inside homepage tool calls, keep project_dir and path relative to this workspace, for example 'my-site' or 'my-site/src/app/page.tsx'.
